name: test_accounting_precision
reason: Upstream accounting precision semantics are not implemented behind the Windows native ABI.

name: test_alloc_*
reason: Upstream allocation-failure injection exercises C allocator hook exhaustion; Eiffel parser storage is Eiffel-managed and not a programmer-visible allocation contract.

name: test_nsalloc_*
reason: Namespace allocation-failure injection exercises C allocator hook exhaustion; Eiffel parser storage is Eiffel-managed and not a programmer-visible allocation contract.

name: test_ext_entity_invalid_suspended_parse
reason: Stop/suspend external entity fault handling is not implemented.

name: test_subordinate_suspend
reason: Subordinate parser suspension fault handling is not implemented.

name: test_resume_invalid_parse
reason: True resume continuation is not implemented.

name: test_resume_resuspended
reason: True resume continuation and resuspension are not implemented.

reason: True resume continuation through internal entity expansion is not implemented.

name: test_resume_entity_with_syntax_error
reason: True resume continuation through entity syntax errors is not implemented.

name: test_suspend_resume_parameter_entity
reason: True resume continuation through parameter entity parsing is not implemented.

name: test_nested_entity_suspend
reason: True resume continuation through nested entity expansion is not implemented.

name: test_nested_entity_suspend_2
reason: True resume continuation through nested entity expansion is not implemented.

name: test_siphash*
reason: Hash collision/salt behavior is link-compatible but not libexpat-equivalent.

reason: Reparse deferral behavior is not implemented.

reason: Reparse deferral/buffer heuristic behavior is not implemented.

reason: Reparse deferral/buffer heuristic behavior is not implemented.
